name: periscopephp/laravel
description: Laravel adapter for php-periscope — wires Telescope-tier observability events into the periscope C extension's trace.

suggest.laravel/ai: Enables AI-powered slow-query / N+1 / exception / error-log advisories via the AiAdvisor. Picks any provider — Ollama (free), OpenRouter (free tier), OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, etc.
suggest.laravel/mcp: Exposes periscope traces to AI agents (Claude / Cursor / Codex) via the Model Context Protocol. After install: `claude mcp add periscope -- php artisan mcp:start periscope`.
